leavePolicy.optionalHolidayNote: You may avail up to 2 optional holidays per calendar year. Apply at least 3 working days in advance.
leavePolicy.restrictedHolidayNote: National and festival holidays are company-wide offs. No leave application required.

documentTemplates.title: Offer Letter
documentTemplates.description: Formal job offer with role, CTC, and joining details.

documentTemplates.title: Appointment Letter
documentTemplates.description: Confirms employment terms after the candidate accepts the offer.

documentTemplates.title: Employment Contract
documentTemplates.body:
EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT

This Agreement is entered on {{letter_date}} between Gamyam Technologies Pvt. Ltd. ("Company") and {{employee_name}} ("Employee"), ID {{employee_id}}.

1. Position: {{role}}, {{department}} department.
2. Commencement: {{join_date}}.
3. Compensation: Annual CTC {{annual_ctc}} as per company payroll policy.
4. Confidentiality: Employee shall not disclose proprietary information.
5. Termination: Either party may terminate with notice as per applicable labour laws and company policy.

Employee signature: _________________    Date: _________

For Company: {{hr_signatory}}

documentTemplates.title: NDA & Confidentiality
documentTemplates.description: Non-disclosure agreement for employees and contractors.
documentTemplates.body:
NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

Date: {{letter_date}}

Between Gamyam Technologies and {{employee_name}} ({{employee_email}}).

The Employee acknowledges access to confidential information including product roadmaps, client data, and HR records. The Employee agrees not to disclose such information during employment and for two (2) years thereafter.

Governing law: Laws of India. Jurisdiction: Hyderabad.

Signed:
{{employee_name}} _________________
{{hr_signatory}} (HR) _________________

documentTemplates.title: Experience Certificate
documentTemplates.description: Issued when an employee completes their tenure.
documentTemplates.body:
TO WHOMSOEVER IT MAY CONCERN

Date: {{letter_date}}

This is to certify that {{employee_name}} (Employee ID: {{employee_id}}) was employed with Gamyam Technologies Pvt. Ltd. as {{role}} in the {{department}} department from {{join_date}} to {{relieving_date}}.

During this period, we found {{employee_name}} to be sincere, diligent, and professional in conduct.

We wish {{employee_name}} success in future endeavours.

For Gamyam Technologies,
{{hr_signatory}}
Authorized Signatory

documentTemplates.title: Relieving Letter
documentTemplates.description: Confirms last working day and clearance of dues.
documentTemplates.body:
GAMYAM TECHNOLOGIES PVT. LTD.

Date: {{letter_date}}

Dear {{employee_name}},

This is to confirm that you were relieved from your services as {{role}} ({{department}}) with effect from {{relieving_date}}, following acceptance of your resignation and completion of exit formalities.

Your full and final settlement will be processed as per company policy. Please return all company assets if not already submitted.

We thank you for your contributions.

Sincerely,
{{hr_signatory}}
Human Resources

documentTemplates.title: Salary Revision Letter
documentTemplates.description: Communicates revised compensation effective from a given date.
documentTemplates.body:
Date: {{letter_date}}

Dear {{employee_name}},

Further to your performance review, we are pleased to inform you that your revised Annual CTC will be {{annual_ctc}}, effective {{revision_effective_date}}.

Your monthly gross will be updated in payroll accordingly. Other terms of employment remain unchanged.

Congratulations and keep up the excellent work.

Regards,
{{hr_signatory}}
HR – Gamyam Technologies

documentTemplates.title: Warning Letter
documentTemplates.description: Formal written warning for policy or conduct issues.
documentTemplates.body:
PRIVATE & CONFIDENTIAL

Date: {{letter_date}}

To: {{employee_name}} ({{employee_id}})
Department: {{department}}

Subject: Warning Letter

Dear {{employee_name}},

This letter serves as a formal warning regarding: {{warning_reason}}.

You are required to take corrective action immediately. Failure to improve may lead to further disciplinary action up to and including termination.

Please acknowledge receipt by signing below.

Employee acknowledgment: _________________  Date: _________

{{hr_signatory}}
Human Resources
